---
title: "Saara Martinmäki"
---

::: {.profile-page}

::: {.profile-text}

## Data Analyst

Staff support, General quantitative research methods.


**E:** S.Martinmaki [at] impact.arq.org

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/semartinmaki/)

:::

::: {.profile-photo}

![](../images/people/saara.png)

:::

:::
